description: Time-of-day (peak / off-peak) pricing overlay. The public price feeds (LiteLLM/OpenRouter) list only the standard daytime rate; some providers (notably DeepSeek) bill a steep discount during a fixed off-peak UTC window. This curated overlay records the window + a discount multiplier per matched model; build-public-corpus.py applies the multiplier to the base input/output rates and writes an absolute `off_peak` block into pricing/catalog.json. Consumers (zoder, tokenomics) charge the off_peak rate when a call's UTC time falls in the window. Matched by `match` substrings against the catalog model id (case-insensitive); first match wins.
